calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Accounting Filed On Oct 25, 2005
Off Calendar Nov-20-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Called with case number 286235. Harry Edgar Rice appearing for special administrator Geneva McGee. Henry Glasser appearing for Eugene Rose. Settlement did not take place. Mr. Rice has filed an Appeal on the Order granting Summary Judgment. Mr. Glasser wants to have the matter set for trial. Court does not know if the matter can go to trial if the order is on appeal. Unless Mr. Glasser can withdraw the Summary Judgment Order, this Court has no jurisdiction to do anything. The Special Administrator is going forward with the other litigations. Both petitions are off calendar. Counsel can bring them back when it's appropriate. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Floyd Butler, CSR#2518. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Accounting Filed On Oct 25, 2005
Off Calendar Oct-30-2006 Continued To Nov-20-06 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Henry Glasser (Counsel for Eugenen Rose); Harry Rice (Counsel for Geneva McGee).

Counsel reported to the Court on the status of the Court of Appeal mediation and noted that the parties are close to settlement of the matter. At their request, the Court granted a continuance of the current hearing to November 20, 2006 at 11:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. After brief discussion, the Court stated that any proposed Settlement Agreement should be reduced to writing and filed with the Court rather than stated on the record.

Judicial Office: Dorothy L. McMath, Commissioner; Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR #11722 ; Bailiff: None; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: None.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Accounting Filed On Oct 25, 2005
Off Calendar Oct-16-2006 Continued To Oct-30-06 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance made. Matter is continued to 10/30 at 11:00am the same date as the Estate matter. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Patty Hubble CSR#3058. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Accounting Filed On Oct 25, 2005
Off Calendar Sep-11-2006 Continued To Oct-16-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Accounting Filed On Oct 25, 2005
Off Calendar Aug-07-2006 Continued To Sep-11-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Accounting Filed On Oct 25, 2005
Off Calendar Jul-24-2006 Continued To Aug-07-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Henry Glasser appearing for trustee. The case is on appeal. Counsel reports to the court that the trustee is not holding any assets. The court wants the trustee to file the accounting. Matter is continued to 8/7. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Teena Paxton CSR#1558. Clerk: Ella Yip.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Accounting Filed On Oct 25, 2005
Off Calendar Jul-13-2006 Continued To Jul-24-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Harry Edgar Rice appearing for contestant. Henry Glasser appearing for Eugene Rose, moving party. On Mr. Rice's ex parte motion to continue hearing date. Mr. Glasser is objecting to the continuance. Court is denying the motion. It is not timely.
Mr. Glasser is objecting to the two declarations. The evidentary rulings are Declaration of Michael McGee is sustained to the 2nd paragraph. Declartion of Dr. Mckinzey is sustained in part and overruled in part. As a whole it is overruled. Paragraph 3 is sustained. Paragraph 4 is sustained to the next to the last sentence. Paragraph 5 is sustained to the last sentence. Oral argument presented by both counse. Court wants further brief from both counsel on who has the burdon of proof on the summary judgment and how may inference be use in showing the facts or disputed facts by 7/27. Those issues will be taken under submission on 7/27. Summary adjudication is granted on due execution. Mr. Glasser will prepare an order.
In the trust matter, Mr. Rose was ordered to file an accounting. Mr. Glasser thought the matter was continued to 7/28. He will file the accounting by 7/24. Matter is continued to 7/24. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Floyd Butler CSR#2518. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Accounting Filed On Oct 25, 2005
Off Calendar Jun-12-2006 Continued To Jul-13-06 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance made. Matter is continued to 7/13 at 1:30pm the same date of the summary judgment hearing. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Accounting Filed On Oct 25, 2005
Off Calendar Apr-03-2006 Continued To Jun-12-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Harry Edgar Rice appearing for Geneva McGee. Henry Glasser appearing for Eugene Rose. Issues addressed. Appeal is pending on validity of the trust. Mr. Rose will need to account from 6/17/2003 until the receipt of funds into the blocked account. Restoring of funds to the trust is deferred until after the appeal. Mr. Rose will need to verify his supplement. Mr. Glasser said there are no trust assets in Mr. Rose's possession. Matter is continued to 6/12. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
